action_list.name: action_create
action_list.description: System action for creating an application

attrs.script:
# Java
sudo dnf update -y
sudo dnf install -y java-11-openjdk-devel

# Spark
sudo dnf install -y wget
wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/spark/spark-3.5.0/spark-3.5.0-bin-hadoop3.tgz
tar -xzf spark-3.5.0-bin-hadoop3.tgz
sudo mv spark-3.5.0-bin-hadoop3 /opt/spark

export SPARK_HOME=/opt/spark
export PATH=$PATH:$SPARK_HOME/bin

cat << 'EOF' > empty.py
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
spark.stop()
EOF

$SPARK_HOME/bin/spark-submit \
  --packages io.delta:delta-spark_2.12:3.1.0,org.apache.hadoop:hadoop-aws:3.3.4 \
  empty.py

cat << 'EOF' > preload.py
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("preload-delta-s3a") \
    .getOrCreate()

spark.stop()
EOF

$SPARK_HOME/bin/spark-submit \
  --packages io.delta:delta-spark_2.12:3.1.0,org.apache.hadoop:hadoop-aws:3.3.4 \
  --conf spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.endpoint=http://@@{object_ipaddress}@@ \
  --conf spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.access.key=@@{S3_Access_Key}@@ \
  --conf spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.secret.key=@@{S3_Secret_Key}@@ \
  --conf spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.path.style.access=true \
  --conf spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.connection.ssl.enabled=true \
  preload.py
  
  ls ~/.ivy2/jars | grep delta
  sudo mkdir -p $SPARK_HOME/conf

cat << 'EOF' | sudo tee $SPARK_HOME/conf/spark-defaults.conf
# ===============================
# Delta Lake
# ===============================
spark.sql.extensions=io.delta.sql.DeltaSparkSessionExtension
spark.sql.catalog.spark_catalog=org.apache.spark.sql.delta.catalog.DeltaCatalog

# ===============================
# S3A – Nutanix Object Storage
# (HTTP, IP-based endpoint)
# ===============================
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.endpoint=http://10.54.60.8
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.path.style.access=true
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.connection.ssl.enabled=false
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.impl=org.apache.hadoop.fs.s3a.S3AFileSystem

# Performance & compatibility
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.fast.upload=true
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.connection.maximum=100

# Avoid region mismatch
spark.hadoop.fs.s3a.endpoint.region=us-east-1
EOF

export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=@@{S3_Access_Key}@@
export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=@@{S3_Secret_Key}@@

echo 'export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=@@{S3_Access_Key}@@' >> ~/.bashrc
echo 'export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=@@{S3_Secret_Key}@@' >> ~/.bashrc
source ~/.bashrc

cat << 'EOF' > test-delta-enabled.py
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("delta-enabled-check") \
    .getOrCreate()

print("Delta extension:",
      spark.conf.get("spark.sql.extensions"))

spark.stop()
EOF

sudo cp ~/.ivy2/jars/io.delta_delta-spark_2.12-3.1.0.jar $SPARK_HOME/jars/
sudo cp ~/.ivy2/jars/io.delta_delta-storage-3.1.0.jar $SPARK_HOME/jars/
sudo cp ~/.ivy2/jars/io.delta_* $SPARK_HOME/jars/

$SPARK_HOME/bin/spark-submit test-delta-enabled.py

ls $SPARK_HOME/jars | grep postgresql

wget https://jdbc.postgresql.org/download/postgresql-42.7.3.jar
sudo mv postgresql-42.7.3.jar $SPARK_HOME/jars/

java -version
# Java 11 ✔

$SPARK_HOME/bin/spark-submit --version
# Spark 3.5 ✔

cd /opt
sudo wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/zeppelin/zeppelin-0.11.0/zeppelin-0.11.0-bin-all.tgz

sudo tar -xzf zeppelin-0.11.0-bin-all.tgz
sudo mv zeppelin-0.11.0-bin-all zeppelin
sudo chown -R nutanix:nutanix /opt/zeppelin

cd /opt/zeppelin/conf

cp zeppelin-env.sh.template zeppelin-env.sh

cat << 'EOF' >> zeppelin-env.sh

# ===============================
# Auto-generated Zeppelin Env
# ===============================
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk
export SPARK_HOME=/opt/spark
export ZEPPELIN_PORT=8080
export ZEPPELIN_LOG_DIR=/opt/zeppelin/logs
EOF

grep -E "JAVA_HOME|SPARK_HOME|ZEPPELIN_PORT" zeppelin-env.sh

cd /opt/zeppelin/conf

cp zeppelin-site.xml.template zeppelin-site.xml

sed -i '/<\/configuration>/ i\
  <property>\
    <name>zeppelin.interpreter.dep.mvnRepo</name>\
    <value>~/.m2/repository</value>\
  </property>\
' zeppelin-site.xml

grep mvnRepo zeppelin-site.xml

mkdir -p /opt/zeppelin/conf/interpreter/spark

cat << 'EOF' > /opt/zeppelin/conf/interpreter/spark/interpreter-setting.json
{
  "name": "spark",
  "group": "spark",
  "properties": {
    "spark.master": {
      "value": "",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "spark.submit.deployMode": {
      "value": "client",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "spark.sql.extensions": {
      "value": "io.delta.sql.DeltaSparkSessionExtension",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "spark.sql.catalog.spark_catalog": {
      "value": "org.apache.spark.sql.delta.catalog.DeltaCatalog",
      "type": "string"
    }
  }
}
EOF

cd /opt/zeppelin/conf

sed -i '/ZEPPELIN_ADDR/d' zeppelin-env.sh
echo 'export ZEPPELIN_ADDR=0.0.0.0' >> zeppelin-env.sh

cd /opt/zeppelin

bin/zeppelin-daemon.sh start

bin/zeppelin-daemon.sh status

ss -lntp | grep 8080

action_list.name: action_delete
action_list.description: System action for deleting an application. Deletes created VMs as well

action_list.name: action_start
action_list.description: System action for starting an application

action_list.name: action_stop
action_list.description: System action for stopping an application

action_list.name: action_restart
action_list.description: System action for restarting an application

cloud_init.user_data:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: nutanix
    sudo: ['ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL']
chpasswd:
  list: |
    nutanix:@@{nutanix.secret}@@
  expire: False
ssh_pwauth:   true
